spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates autocorrect='on' vs 'off' across locale-tagged fields and now calls out where platform dictionaries or IMEs mediate the behavior.

interactive.rationale: The matrix remains typeable per row with a global on/off/inherit override that re-renders the live fields.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature index promises script-specific inputs and IME interaction notes; the page now surfaces those notes directly in each row.

edge_cases.rationale: Each row now identifies whether direct keyboard input, platform dictionaries, or IME composition can override or mediate autocorrect.

references.rationale: The concept page includes the canonical chromestatus.com/feature/6264645053710336 link.

design_system.rationale: Uses CSS variables throughout, no raw hex creeping in, button colours and contrast appear within AA.

summary: Resolved the prior row-annotation and reference gaps by adding a visible IME / platform mediation column for every locale row and embedding the ChromeStatus link. Verified with chrome-devtools-mcp: all 8 rows rendered mediation cells, direct/platform/IME modes were visible, Force all ON/OFF updated every input, and console/network were clean.
